title: MGN 577 (M) Amendment 2 maintenance of lists of crew ashore
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Crew Agreements, Lists of Crew and Discharge of Seamen) Regulations 1991 (S.I 1991/2144) as amended by the Merchant Shipping (Maritime Labour Convention) (Consequential and Minor Amendments) Regulations 2014 (S.I 2014/1614)etc.  Amendment 2 updates reference information only.  Notice to   shipowners employers masters of merchant vessels  "

taxons.title: Safe and compliant operation of vessels
